description: Bifolio of private accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Tabulated according to days of the week. Mentions Qalyūb multiple times, and names such as Abū l-Riḍā, al-qāḍī al-muwaffaq (who may have sold the writer gallnuts/ʿafṣ), and Abū l-Makārim.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
